greeting: Hey {name}! Great to see you. How can I help? 😊
Hello {name}! I'm Abdullah Assistant AI — ready to assist you!
Hi {name}! Hope you're having an amazing day. What's on your mind?
Hey there{name}! What can I do for you today? 🚀
Welcome back{name}! I'm all ears. Go ahead!
farewell: Goodbye! It was great chatting with you. See you next time! 👋
Take care! Don't hesitate to come back if you need help. Bye! 😊
Farewell! It was a pleasure. Have a wonderful day! 🎉
Bye bye! Remember, I'm always here when you need me. 👋
name_capture: Nice to meet you, {name}! I'll remember your name. How can I help you today? 😊
Great name, {name}! I've got that noted. What can I do for you?
Hello {name}! Wonderful to meet you. Feel free to ask me anything!
Got it! I'll call you {name} from now on. How can I assist? 🙌
ask_name: Your name is {name}! I remembered it as soon as you told me. 😄
Of course! You told me your name is {name}. I never forget! 🧠
You're {name}! I have a good memory, don't I? 😊
ask_name_unknown: Hmm, I don't know your name yet! You can tell me by saying 'My name is ...' 😊
I don't have your name on record yet. Share it with me — say 'My name is ...'!
bot_identity: I'm Abdullah Assistant AI — a professional AI SaaS chatbot console built with Python, Flask, and Google Gemini! 🤖
They call me Abdullah Assistant AI! I'm an intelligent chatbot ready to help you with anything. 🚀
I am Abdullah Assistant AI, your friendly AI assistant. I use Google Gemini API to chat with you! 🧠
how_are_you: I'm functioning at 100%! All my logic circuits are firing perfectly. How about you? 😄
Doing great, thanks for asking! I'm always energised to help. What do you need? ⚡
Never better! My intent engine is running smoothly. What can I do for you? 🤖
Top of the world! Well... top of the console at least. How can I help? 😂
capabilities:
Here's what I can do for you:

  🗣️  Greet you and remember your name
  ⏰  Tell you the current time & date
  😄  Tell jokes to cheer you up
  💡  Share motivational quotes
  ➗  Solve math expressions (e.g. 5 + 3 * 2)
  🤖  Answer questions about AI & Python
  💬  Have a friendly small talk

  Just type naturally and I'll do my best! 😊

I've got quite a few tricks:

  ✅  Smart intent detection
  ✅  Session memory (I remember your name!)
  ✅  Jokes & motivational quotes
  ✅  Live time & date
  ✅  Math solver
  ✅  AI & Python FAQs

  Try asking me anything! 🚀
faq_python:
🐍 Python is a high-level, general-purpose programming language created by Guido van Rossum in 1991. It's known for:

  ✅  Clean, readable syntax
  ✅  Massive ecosystem (libraries & frameworks)
  ✅  Versatility (web, AI, data science, automation)
  ✅  Beginner-friendly yet enterprise-powerful

  This chatbot is built with Python! 🚀

Python is one of the most popular programming languages in the world! It's used in web development (Django, Flask), data science (pandas, NumPy), machine learning (TensorFlow, PyTorch), and of course — chatbots! 🐍
faq_ai: 🤖 Artificial Intelligence (AI) is the simulation of human intelligence by computer systems. It includes Machine Learning (learning from data), Computer Vision (understanding images), and NLP (understanding text). I leverage Google Gemini for AI responses!

AI (Artificial Intelligence) is a broad field of computer science focused on building smart machines capable of performing tasks that typically require human intelligence — like understanding language, recognising patterns, and making decisions. 🤖
faq_rule_based: 🔧 I support both advanced AI (via Google Gemini) and intelligent fallback rules! If the API is offline, my local regex matching, IntentHandler, and ResponseGenerator take over to answer you immediately. 💪
Rule-based AI works by matching input to predefined patterns and returning structured responses. If Gemini is offline, I use structured fallback logic so you always get a response! 🔧
faq_decodelabs: 🏢 DecodeLabs is the platform behind the original chatbot assignment. This project represents the DecodeLabs Project, enhanced & developed into Abdullah Assistant AI by Muhammad Abdullah. 🚀
This project is based on the DecodeLabs Project chatbot assignment, now fully enhanced and developed as a premium AI SaaS platform by Muhammad Abdullah! 💻
thank_you: You're welcome! Always happy to help. 😊
Anytime! That's what I'm here for. 🙌
My pleasure! Feel free to ask anything else. ✨
Glad I could help! You're awesome. 🌟
No problem at all! Keep the questions coming. 🚀
age: I was born to assist you! In version terms, I am Abdullah Assistant AI v3.0.
Consider me forever young and always ready to learn! 🤖
I'm as old as the code that runs me — now fully upgraded to Abdullah Assistant AI v3.0! 🚀
weather: I wish I could check the weather for you, but I don't have internet access! 🌤️ Try asking Google or your local weather app.
Unfortunately I can't fetch live weather data — no internet connection. But I hope it's sunny wherever you are! ☀️
creator: I am based on the DecodeLabs Project chatbot assignment, enhanced & developed by Muhammad Abdullah. 🏗️
My developer is Muhammad Abdullah, who enhanced and developed this platform from the original DecodeLabs Project chatbot assignment. 🤖
fallback: Hmm, I didn't quite catch that. 🤔 Try saying 'help' to see what I can do!
I'm not sure I understand. Could you rephrase that? Or type 'help' for a list of things I can help with.
That's a bit outside my current knowledge. Type 'help' to see my capabilities! 🙂
Interesting! But I'm not trained for that yet. Try 'help' to explore what I can do. 😊
I'll need to pass on that one! Type 'help' to discover my features. 🤖
